name: agent-code-monitoring-plugins
description: Official plugin marketplace for Agent Code Monitoring — analytics, productivity, developer tools, insights, and dashboard connectivity plugins for monitoring and optimizing your Claude Code sessions.

plugins.name: acm-analytics
plugins.description: Deep analytics on Claude Code sessions — token usage (total_input/total_output/total_cache_read/total_cache_write with compaction baselines pre-summed), cost breakdowns via the pricing engine, usage trends over 365 days, and productivity scoring.

plugins.name: acm-productivity
plugins.description: Productivity automation — daily standups, weekly reports, sprint summaries from session data, and workflow optimization using the workflow intelligence API's 11 datasets.

plugins.name: acm-devtools
plugins.description: Developer tools for the Agent Monitor — session debugging with full event chain inspection, hook diagnostics, data export (JSON/CSV/Markdown), and system health checks.

plugins.name: acm-insights
plugins.description: AI-powered insights — pattern detection via workflow intelligence (tool flow transitions, agent co-occurrence), anomaly alerting, optimization recommendations, and session comparison.

plugins.name: acm-dashboard
plugins.description: Dashboard connector — quick status checks, one-line metrics, and MCP server integration for direct tool access to the Agent Monitor API.
